title: Kelp Farm
description: An automated kelp farm that uses pistons to break the kelp column, collects drops via a water stream into hoppers, and can feed a furnace array for dried kelp (fuel and food). Kelp grows upward in water — an observer or clock triggers a piston to break it at 1 block above the base. Requires at least 2 blocks of water depth. The base kelp block remains attached to the sand floor to restart growth.
